mapper.select: SELECT id, teacher_id, course_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM teacher_course_assignment WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, teacher_id, course_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM teacher_course_assignment WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY course_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE teacher_course_assignment SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
